ddls:
CREATE TABLE "microcontrollers" (
  "mc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microcontroller */,
  "mc_name" TEXT /* Name of the microcontroller */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package type (foreign key) */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer (foreign key) */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version (foreign key) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the microcontroller */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the microcontroller */,
  "obsolete" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the microcontroller is obsolete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microcontrollers_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microcontrollers_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES package_types ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microcontrollers_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_configurations" (
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin configuration entry */,
  "mc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microcontroller to which the pin belongs (foreign key) */,
  "pin_number" INTEGER /* Number of the pin in the microcontroller package */,
  "functionality" TEXT /* Functionality of the pin (e.g., INPUT, OUTPUT, GCLK) */,
  "pin_type" TEXT /* Type of the pin (e.g., Analog, Digital) */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal associated with the pin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pin configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_configurations_mc_id FOREIGN KEY ("mc_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_types" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package type */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package type (e.g., TQFP, J-lead) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package type */,
  "lead_count" INTEGER /* Number of leads in the package */,
  "package_size" TEXT /* Size of the package (e.g., 10x10mm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "mc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microcontroller to which the version belongs (foreign key) */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the microcontroller */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_mc_id FOREIGN KEY ("mc_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "mc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microcontroller being accessed (foreign key) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the microcontroller data (foreign key) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the microcontroller data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mc_id FOREIGN KEY ("mc_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role (foreign key) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "mc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microcontroller to which the document belongs (foreign key) */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., datasheet, user manual) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_mc_id FOREIGN KEY ("mc_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compatibility" (
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility entry */,
  "mc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microcontroller (foreign key) */,
  "compatible_mc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compatible microcontroller (foreign key) */,
  "compatibility_type" TEXT /* Type of compatibility (e.g., pin-to-pin, software) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compatibility_compatible_mc_id FOREIGN KEY ("compatible_mc_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compatibility_mc_id FOREIGN KEY ("mc_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mc_id")
)
